name: Atelier V2
tagline: Editorial studio-commerce with a vertical sidebar
description: Atelier is an editorial, gallery-grade theme for studios, makers, and design-led shops. Its signature is a fixed vertical left sidebar — a sticky, full-height navigation column set as a numbered index, with the logo at the top and search, account, and cart at the foot. A warm cream and cool charcoal palette, a Caslon-style display serif over a warm reading serif, and a monospace label voice give every page the cadence of a printed broadsheet. Full-bleed imagery, generous vertical rhythm, 3:4 product portraits, and square corners keep the focus on the product as artifact.

styles.name: Atelier
styles.description: The signature warm-neutral balance — charcoal text on cream, EB Garamond + Lora.

styles.name: Gallery
styles.description: High-contrast clinical white for pure archival focus — Playfair Display + Lora.

styles.name: Botanic
styles.description: Muted desaturated green-cream for softer editorial moments — Libre Baskerville + EB Garamond.

features: Vertical left sidebar navigation with numbered index
Section groups + theme blocks (new theme architecture)
Cart drawer with free-shipping progress bar
Quick add and second-image hover on product cards
WCAG 2.2 AA: skip links, focus rings, ARIA live regions
View Transitions page cross-fade (setting-gated, reduced-motion safe)
author: Ruiz Digital
